---

# Default Merchandising Rules

The **Default Merchandising Rule option** is now designed to offer greater flexibility, transparency, and precision when managing product visibility within Smart Collections. Merchandising rules and pinning now share a menu point and are combined into one area.

The new UI is more aligned with a merchant’s unique business goals—especially in high-conversion environments like promotions, seasonal campaigns, or category-specific push strategies.

With this new interface, merchants can:

- **Define logic upfront** that reflects business needs—from pushing high-margin products to promoting seasonal items or balancing stock.
- **Preview changes in real time** before deploying them, eliminating the guesswork of how ranking logic will affect live pages.

## To access

- Go to: **Smart Collections > Default Merchandising**
  ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/0ce3f7c7-e103-4797-b460-b80d6391a663/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=736)

On this page, you will see all the merchandising rules that has been created on the account. 

## Add Default Rule

- 
  ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/9d6a30c3-8aec-41d9-aee2-f47092ce8dcd/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=736)
- On the Add default rule page, you can choose from these two options:  - Add default Pinning Rule
  - Add default Merchandising Rule

![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/d8fe2442-74b8-4997-8fb8-ea08b8968465/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=760)

## Add Default Merchandising Rule

Creating a default merchandising rule allows you to apply automated logic that controls how products are prioritized across selected collections.

1. Click on **Add Default Merchandising Rule**.
2. On the **Create Merchandising Rule** page, give your rule a unique **Name**.
3. Under **Select Collections**, choose one or more collections where this rule should apply. You can select multiple collections in one go.
  ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/88ad30bd-fadf-463d-ba06-8ca3640c4bdd/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=736)
4. Click on **Add Condition** to apply the condition you want.
5. Click **Save** to apply the rule.
6. The rule will now be save and, you will see a notification “Merchandising Rule Successfully created”
  ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/9d02983d-6391-460c-b168-b16f95b8f6fd/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=736)

## ➕ Add Conditions to Your Rule

Once you’ve selected your collections, click **Add Conditions**. Here’s where you define the logic:

- **Actions Available:**  - **Include** — Show only the products that match these conditions.
  - **Exclude** — Hide products that match these conditions.
  - **Promote** — Boost visibility of products matching the rule.
    ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/cdd1b988-35b9-4760-9395-4418aced9741/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=712)
- **Field Options:**
Choose the product field(s) the condition should be based on. Available fields include:  - Brand
  - Color
  - Size
  - Price
  - Category, etc.
    ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/ac02a4a8-0472-44dd-b171-6cdf97499f7c/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=712)
- **Values:**
Set the values you want to match. For example:  - Action: `Promote`
  - Field: `price`
  - Value: `50 to 100`
    ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/ef4b5784-2da5-42e3-a08c-9ea76fec3bf2/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=712)
  - Once a condition is defined, click the **checkmark** to apply it.
    ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/2e537272-d901-488c-8ba2-1fdbd02d651f/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=736)
- Once done, click on **Save** to apply the rule.
  ![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/d8284e01-c3a4-4be8-9479-366d094b45d1/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=736)

## Popularity Weight

When creating a Default Merchandising Rule, you can fine-tune how product popularity influences the final product order by adjusting the **Popularity Weight**. 

Popularity Weight determines how much influence the **product popularity score** has on the sorting of products within the selected collection. By increasing or decreasing this multiplier, merchants can balance between rule-based promotions and naturally popular products.

This setting is available via the **Advanced Settings** icon shown beside the **Select Collections** dropdown.

![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/dffb522c-1a3f-4ff3-9c42-761fb79b1201/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=760)

### Popularity Weight Options

The system offers a slider with the following settings:

| Weight | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **0** | Popularity is completely ignored. Only rule-based logic applies. |
| **0.5x** | Minimal influence of popularity on product ordering. |
| **1x** (Default) | Standard influence — popularity is weighted equally with other merchandising rules. |
| **50x** | High influence — popularity significantly affects ordering, overriding lower-weighted rules. |
| **100x** | Maximum influence — popular products dominate the top positions. |

#### How to Use It Effectively

- **Use 0** when you want complete control over product order through conditions like *Promote*, *Exclude*, or *Include*.
- **Use 1x** when you want a balanced approach — ideal for collections where popularity generally reflects product performance.
- **Use 50x or 100x** if you want your best-selling or most viewed products to always appear at the top, regardless of other rule logic.

> **Note:** **Tip**: If you're testing rule performance, try adjusting the Popularity Weight in combination with the Promote/Exclude rules to observe real-time preview impacts on product positions.

## Follow Along Training Guide

Try the Follow-Along Training Guide for a step-by-step walkthrough of Default Merchandising Rules.
It provides a screen-by-screen explanation to help you understand and configure rules effectively.

![Image](https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/64caae23-7a1a-4ed6-af62-15feac4fd950/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=760)
